hyperedges.label: Cross-vendor review pipeline applied per sprint
Four Storage Algebras on a Shared Transactional Substrate

nodes.label: One Put per Key per Transaction
nodes.norm_label: one put per key per transaction

nodes.label: One Write per Key per Transaction
nodes.rationale: Rejecting same-key reuse makes timestamp and version addressing well-defined instead of silently losing an intermediate history row.
nodes.norm_label: one write per key per transaction

nodes.label: Checkpoint Manifest-Chunks Junction Table
nodes.rationale: A btree-indexed junction table replaces an array/GIN design that could not accelerate the scalar membership anti-join used by garbage collection.

nodes.label: Full VersionedEntry Property Comparison
nodes.rationale: Property P4 compares the complete versioned record so equal adjacent values cannot hide a broken version or timestamp mapping.

nodes.label: MongoDB Dependency and Nix Build Problem
nodes.rationale: MongoDB is compiled from source in the target Nix environment, adds a second service and database technology, and supplies capabilities this small custom store does not need.
nodes.norm_label: mongodb dependency and nix build problem

nodes.label: FerretDB Compatibility-Shim Rejection
nodes.rationale: FerretDB was rejected because its immature transaction and large-blob semantics are weakest in the exact multi-document checkpoint patterns UmbraDB needs.

nodes.label: Tier-1-Only Scope
nodes.rationale: The rebuild changes client persistence only; the separate Tier-2 indexer and TimescaleDB design remains unchanged.

nodes.label: External Claim Verification Rule
nodes.rationale: Every dependency or API claim must be checked against installed types or version-pinned upstream sources because prior reviews found plausible but incorrect assumptions.

nodes.label: Tasks — superseded by per-sprint openspec changes
nodes.norm_label: tasks — superseded by per-sprint openspec changes

nodes.label: OpenSpec review cadence (Opus panel + Fable 5 + Codex audit)
nodes.norm_label: openspec review cadence (opus panel + fable 5 + codex audit)

nodes.label: Requirement: Migrations are idempotent and ordered
nodes.norm_label: requirement: migrations are idempotent and ordered

nodes.label: Requirement: Schema isolation is the default
nodes.norm_label: requirement: schema isolation is the default

nodes.label: Requirement: Postgres errors surface as StorageError hierarchy
nodes.norm_label: requirement: postgres errors surface as storageerror hierarchy

nodes.label: Requirement: Unconditional writes are gapless and monotonic (Law T1)
nodes.norm_label: requirement: unconditional writes are gapless and monotonic (law t1)

nodes.label: Requirement: transaction handle honored or rejected (Sprint 1: rejected)
nodes.norm_label: requirement: transaction handle honored or rejected (sprint 1: rejected)

nodes.label: Requirement: put's CAS guard distinguishes conflict from absence
nodes.norm_label: requirement: put's cas guard distinguishes conflict from absence

nodes.label: Requirement: same-transaction reuse rejected at trigger level
nodes.norm_label: requirement: same-transaction reuse rejected at trigger level

nodes.label: Requirement: history intervals never overlap (Law T5)
nodes.norm_label: requirement: history intervals never overlap (law t5)

nodes.label: Requirement: TransactionKeyReuseError reachable via public API
nodes.norm_label: requirement: transactionkeyreuseerror reachable via public api

nodes.label: Requirement: Transactions commit or roll back atomically
nodes.norm_label: requirement: transactions commit or roll back atomically

nodes.label: Requirement: transaction timeout surfaces as TransactionFaultError
nodes.norm_label: requirement: transaction timeout surfaces as transactionfaulterror

nodes.label: Requirement: abort before withTransaction starts rejects with AbortError
nodes.norm_label: requirement: abort before withtransaction starts rejects with aborterror

nodes.label: Requirement: resolved handle always refers to its live transaction
nodes.norm_label: requirement: resolved handle always refers to its live transaction

nodes.label: Requirement: at most one holder per lease key (Law L1)
nodes.norm_label: requirement: at most one holder per lease key (law l1)

nodes.label: Requirement: acquireLease waits, tryAcquireLease never blocks
nodes.norm_label: requirement: acquirelease waits, tryacquirelease never blocks

nodes.label: Requirement: connection loss surfaces as LeaseFaultError
nodes.norm_label: requirement: connection loss surfaces as leasefaulterror

nodes.label: Requirement: abort during lease acquisition rejects with AbortError
nodes.norm_label: requirement: abort during lease acquisition rejects with aborterror

nodes.label: Requirement: payloads split into fixed-size chunks
nodes.norm_label: requirement: payloads split into fixed-size chunks

nodes.label: Requirement: save rejects invalid options before work
nodes.norm_label: requirement: save rejects invalid options before work

nodes.label: Requirement: chunk storage is content-addressed and globally deduplicated
nodes.norm_label: requirement: chunk storage is content-addressed and globally deduplicated

nodes.label: Requirement: manifest preserves exact order/multiplicity of chunks
nodes.norm_label: requirement: manifest preserves exact order/multiplicity of chunks

nodes.label: Requirement: checkpoint sequence numbers gapless and monotonic
nodes.norm_label: requirement: checkpoint sequence numbers gapless and monotonic

nodes.label: Requirement: load always fully verifies chunk integrity
nodes.norm_label: requirement: load always fully verifies chunk integrity

nodes.label: Requirement: load rejects structurally-corrupt manifest (dense position)
nodes.norm_label: requirement: load rejects structurally-corrupt manifest (dense position)

nodes.label: Requirement: load rejects tampered chunk-hash sequence
nodes.norm_label: requirement: load rejects tampered chunk-hash sequence

nodes.label: Requirement: load/history read consistent snapshot immune to concurrent prune
nodes.norm_label: requirement: load/history read consistent snapshot immune to concurrent prune

nodes.label: Requirement: load/history distinguish no-checkpoint from exists-elsewhere
nodes.norm_label: requirement: load/history distinguish no-checkpoint from exists-elsewhere

nodes.label: Requirement: history newest-first with gap/duplicate-free cursor paging
nodes.norm_label: requirement: history newest-first with gap/duplicate-free cursor paging

nodes.label: Requirement: prune rejects invalid retainCount before deletion
nodes.norm_label: requirement: prune rejects invalid retaincount before deletion

nodes.label: Requirement: prune retains exactly the N newest complete manifests
nodes.norm_label: requirement: prune retains exactly the n newest complete manifests

nodes.label: Requirement: a chunk referenced by a surviving manifest is never reclaimed (Law C2a)
nodes.norm_label: requirement: a chunk referenced by a surviving manifest is never reclaimed (law c2a)

nodes.label: Requirement: chunk reclamation respects the grace window
nodes.norm_label: requirement: chunk reclamation respects the grace window

nodes.label: Requirement: manifestHash computed once at write time
nodes.norm_label: requirement: manifesthash computed once at write time

nodes.label: Requirement: CheckpointSummary metadata populated and label round-trips
nodes.norm_label: requirement: checkpointsummary metadata populated and label round-trips

nodes.label: Requirement: aborted signal rejects before database work; no mid-flight effect
nodes.norm_label: requirement: aborted signal rejects before database work; no mid-flight effect
